description: A small finch like bird, dark face, with a yellow bill. Brown streaking on the flanks, dark pink chest, red capped.Behaviors: They have been feeding at the finch feeders that have black oil sunflower seed and nyjer seed. With other house finches & pine siskins and such. I first saw/photographed Feb 8. I have not seen them in the last 2 days.Call: chit chit chit followed by a rattling buzzing sound....Plumage: brown streaks, red capped, pink breast
